title: Understanding Bitcoin Payments for Digital Downloads: A Plain-Language Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text:
If you're a creator in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, or other restricted countries, you know the pain of being locked out of payment platforms like PayPal. You want to sell ebooks, courses, or templates online, but every option seems to require a PayPal account or a subscription-based platform with hefty fees. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in, offering a solution to this problem through its Web3 Wallet Connect product, a frontend wallet integration that enables multi-chain QR code payments for digital downloads. In this post, we'll break down the basics of using Bitcoin payments for digital downloads, and show you how to take action."

      "heading": "What This Actually Is and Why It Matters
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Bitcoin payments for digital downloads may sound like a complex topic, but it's actually quite straightforward. In essence, it's a way for creators to sell digital products online without relying on traditional payment processors like PayPal. By using Bitcoin, creators can tap into a global marketplace and reach customers who may not have access to their traditional payment methods. This opens up new revenue streams for creators and gives them more control over their sales process.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

So, how does it actually work? Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect product integrates a frontend wallet that allows buyers to pay in Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, SOL, and over 300 other coins. When a customer buys a digital download, they simply scan the QR code and send the payment in their preferred cryptocurrency. The payment is then verified and processed automatically, eliminating the need for manual intervention or costly transaction fees.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is specifically designed for creators who are struggling to sell their digital products online due to geographical restrictions or platform limitations. Whether you're an author, artist, or entrepreneur, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect product gives you the freedom to reach a global audience and sell your products without relying on traditional payment processors. With no KYC requirements or subscription fees, you can focus on creating and selling your products without any hassle.
You can sell digital products online without relying on traditional payment processors like PayPal.
The Components That Make It Work Together

To get started, you'll need to set up an account on Unchained Commerce's platform, which integrates with its Web3 Wallet Connect product. This will give you access to a custom shop URL, where you can list your digital products for sale. Once a customer buys a product, they'll receive instant access to the download, while you'll receive the payment in your preferred cryptocurrency. The entire process is automated and hassle-free, making it easy to sell your digital products online.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you understand the basics of using Bitcoin payments for digital downloads, it's time to take action. Start by setting up an account on Unchained Commerce's platform and integrating their Web3 Wallet Connect product. List your digital products for sale and reach out to your audience about the new payment options available. With Unchained Commerce, you can start selling your digital products online today and reach a global audience without any hassle.
